name: 4'x5'5" Washable Small Checker Accent Rug Charcoal and Ivory - Room Essentials™: Checkered, OEKO-TEX Certified
description:
Add a touch of playful style to your floor with the Small Checker Rug from Room Essentials™. This area rug features a checkered pattern in black and white that mimics a chessboard for an eye-catching look. It has a tufted, low-pile loop construction that provides cushiony comfort underfoot while being easy to clean, and comes with latex backing that helps keep the rug nicely in place. Whether used as a focal point or to tie together the look of your room, this rectangular rug completes the aesthetic of your space in an instant with its unique appeal.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
